description: Import the S1223 airfoil from '~/Documents/airfoils/s1223.dat' and perform geometric pre-processing. The airfoil must be normalized (chord scaled to 1, origin at LE), de-rotated (chord aligned with x-axis), and globally refined to exactly 160 panels. Set the T.E. Gap to 0.4% chord (0.004) with a blend distance of 0.2. Export the processed airfoil to '~/Documents/airfoils/s1223_modified.dat'.
